_comment: Diagnostic: aligned train-only goal pool (49 episodes; val 6148 excluded). At runtime, each online episode's goal is the libero_wm demo whose t=0 proprio is closest to the LIBERO init_state used. (online start, goal end) thus come from approximately the same trajectory — matching training. NOTE: goal frames are still from training set, so success rate here is a leakage upper bound, not a fair number.

records.task: STUDY_SCENE3: pick up the book and place it in the front compartment of the caddy
